posts.author: Sriram (Sriram Parthasarathy)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Add keyboard shortcuts to create new item and new subitem when working inside an item row

What are you trying to achieve

For our usage and workflow, we create new items as task or project, and create many subitems. It would be wonderful if you can add a keyboard shortcut to create a new item or subitem when focused in an existing item row, and a shortcut to create a new subitem when focused in an existing subitem. It would save a ton of time than having to stop typing, move to the mouse or touch pad, then clicking in a new row in order to add another row.

posts.author: YOGESHP (Yogesh Pokale)
posts.cookedHtml:
Sriram:

when focused in an existing item row

@Sriram Hi Sriram, just wanted to share a handy keyboard shortcut I use.

When you’re focused on an existing item or subitem row, pressing Shift + Enter lets you quickly create a new item or subitem. I find this especially useful when I need to create multiple items or subitems one after another without breaking my flow.
(Note: I’m using a windows system)

I’ve added a few screenshots below for reference. Hope this helps!
